name: SnowlineTrolley
shortDescription: White aluminum-frame cosmetic trolley with three tempered glass shelves. Four casters, magnifying lamp mountable, easy to clean.
description:
The SnowlineTrolley is a practical and functional cosmetic trolley designed specifically for beauty salons, SPAs, and aesthetic treatment rooms.

Its three tempered glass shelves are ideal for organized placement of cosmetics, treatment tools, and accessories. The clean white aluminum frame provides a modern appearance, and the smooth surfaces are easy to clean.

Equipped with four smooth-rolling wheels, it can be easily moved from one room to another. The frame design also allows mounting a magnifying lamp.
metaTitle: SnowlineTrolley | Cosmetic trolley with glass shelves
metaDescription: SnowlineTrolley cosmetic trolley with white aluminum frame and three tempered glass shelves. Wheeled, easily movable, magnifying lamp mountable.

featureRows.headline: Why the SnowlineTrolley?
featureRows.subtitle: Practical, modern, and reliable cosmetic trolley

features.title: Three tempered glass shelves
features.description: The three transparent tempered glass shelves are ideal for clear, organized placement of cosmetics, treatment tools, and accessories. Everything is at hand in an instant.

features.title: Modern design and easy mobility
features.description: The white aluminum frame provides a clean, modern appearance. Thanks to the four smooth-rolling wheels, the trolley can be easily moved around the salon.

faq.question: Does the trolley need assembly?
faq.answer: Yes, minimal assembly is required: mount the glass shelves on the frame and attach the casters. Assembly can be completed in a few minutes.

faq.question: How much weight can each shelf hold?
faq.answer: The tempered glass shelves are durable and sturdy, suitable for placing cosmetics, smaller devices, and treatment tools.

faq.question: How can it be cleaned?
faq.answer: The glass shelves and aluminum frame can be easily wiped down with a damp cloth or surface disinfectant. The glass surface is always hygienic and easy to keep clean.

faq.question: Can a magnifying lamp be mounted on the trolley?
faq.answer: Yes, the frame design allows mounting a magnifying lamp, making the SnowlineTrolley even more versatile.
